response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of diverse development experience, open-source leadership via GISCollective, and Linux/architecture exposure, but the candidate fails the explicit German C1 requirement (resume lists 'Basic') and shows no formal Head of Development or team-lead title, no UML proficiency, and no Python in the skills list. Without near-native German and demonstrated leadership scope, the fit for this executive-level role is weak despite solid technical depth.
strengths: 15+ years building modern systems across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services
Founder of open-source GIS platform (GISCollective) demonstrating Linux/open-source affinity and architectural ownership
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course — transferable to team leadership
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — falls far short of the mandatory C1 proficiency
No formal Head of Development, Tech Lead, or team management title in employment history
Python, UML, and explicit IT security/compliance experience are absent from the resume
